Header file for getting the current value of the real-time clock.

# Purpose
This is a C header file that declares a function related to a real-time clock (RTC) interface. The file includes a standard library header, `stdint.h`, which provides fixed-width integer types. The function [`rtc_get`](<#rtc_get>) is declared to return a `uint32_t` value, which suggests that it retrieves a 32-bit unsigned integer, likely representing the current time or a timestamp from the RTC. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
